name: Glengarry Golf Links
about: Glengarry Golf Links is an 18-hole Scottish Links-style public golf course located in Latrobe, Pennsylvania. The course is noted for its unique upscale layout with four sets of tees, large undulating greens, 50-yard wide fairways, and tall native grasses. The facility features practice facilities including a driving range and practice area, along with a clubhouse pub and outdoor deck for relaxation. Glengarry offers various amenities such as pro shop services, equipment sales, indoor golf at Mulligans, and services for events, outings, and banquets.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive practice facilities including driving range
Full-service clubhouse pub and outdoor deck

food_and_drink.notes: Clubhouse pub and outdoor deck offer great food and drinks

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue has a pro shop with equipment available for purchase.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers food and drinks in its clubhouse pub and outdoor deck.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue mentions events like baby showers, indicating it is family-friendly.
